title: Osied Shawahin
subtitle: Independent Design Director
intro: I believe great design is invisible — it gets out of the way and lets people do what they came to do. Over the past decade, I've led design across fintech, enterprise AI, and consumer products, always driven by the same question: how do we make complex things feel simple? From shaping banking platforms used by millions to directing immersive experiences in museums, my work sits at the intersection of strategy, craft, and empathy. I lead teams, build systems, and obsess over the details that turn good products into ones people genuinely enjoy using.

education.degree: B.F.A in Visual Communications, Digital Media
